## Affected site

- ChatGPT
- Claude
- Gemini
- Perplexity

## What broke

Select all that apply:

- overlay no longer appears
- prompt submission no longer starts timing
- first word is detected too early
- completion never finalizes
- popup history is missing samples
- import/export/raw-data behavior regressed

## Helpful artifacts

If available, include:

- screenshot or screen recording
- relevant prompt/output pattern
- exported sample JSON
- page markup snippet or selector changes
